title: How are countries responding to hantavirus?
snippet: The UK, US and EU are asking all citizens returning home from the virus-hit MV Hondius to self-isolate for about six weeks.

title: TikTok scales back AI-generated video descriptions after absurd errors
snippet: While only rolled out to some users, the feature's bizarre AI-generated descriptions were shared widely.

title: Elon Musk and Tim Cook among CEOs expected to accompany Trump on China trip
snippet: A total of 17 US executives are set to join the president on his visit, where he will meet his Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping.

title: British Steel nationalisation plans announced by Starmer
snippet: The steelworks has been under government control for almost a year, but leglistation to nationalise it will be put forward this week.

title: EU agrees sanctions on Israeli settlers over West Bank violence
snippet: The EU's foreign policy chief said "extremism and violence carry consequences", while Israel branded the move "arbitrary".

title: China should stop hoarding food and fertiliser, says former World Bank chief
snippet: David Malpass' comments come as US President Donald Trump and China's Xi Jinping are due to meet in Beijing.

title: Not so dusty: How tech is changing woodworking
snippet: Woodworking shops have been transformed by tech to make tools safer and more precise.

title: International cyber attack disrupts swathe of universities and schools
snippet: A hacking group breached the academic software Canvas, used by thousands of schools and universities across the globe.

title: US in closely-guarded talks to open new bases in Greenland
snippet: It is seeking to open three bases in the south of the Arctic territory, according to multiple officials familiar with the talks.

title: How driving test booking is changing for learner drivers
snippet: From 12 May, only learner drivers can book their own tests, not instructors.

title: Last passengers leave virus-hit cruise ship as three more test positive
snippet: An American and a French national who have returned home have tested positive for hantavirus.

title: TikTok launches £3.99 subscription for no ads in UK
snippet: Those who don't subscribe will be able to use the platform for free - but be shown personalised ads by default.

title: UK alcohol deaths fall for first time since Covid pandemic
snippet: Experts say the “modest reduction” is “not cause for complacency”, with calls to redouble efforts to slash deaths further.

title: Global forest loss slows but El Niño fires could threaten progress
snippet: The loss of tropical rainforests eased last year, according to new analysis, but scientists warn they are still disappearing rapidly.

title: Ovo energy customers urged not to panic as takeover planned
snippet: All existing tariffs will be honoured in full under a planned deal that could create one of Britain's largest energy suppliers.
